headline: Is Take-Two Interactive Software, Inc. (TTWO) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is TTWO a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Take-Two Interactive Software, Inc. on r/investing by Harmieh. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on TTWO. Take-Two Interactive Software, Inc.’s share was trading at $212.55 as of June 8th. TTWO’s forward P/E was 29.94 according to Yahoo Finance. Take-Two Interactive […]
